steps.t: The Bloody Eagle is a tavern located to the east of the Harbour-warden's Tower in the Sail-haven of Umbar Baharbêl. Eshmun has asked you to meet him a…

Akurga's spear can be found behind the bar in the rear of the Bloody Eagle. Eshmun has asked you to examine Akurga's spear in the Bloody Eagle.
